'''machuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jobsite|jobsite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ch-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jobsite|jobsite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| machuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæchithith|mæchithith]] || [[word:mæchithij|mæchithij]] || [[word:mæchithish|mæchithish]] || [[word:mæchithi|mæchithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:machuchuthuth|machuchuthuth]] || [[word:machuchuthuj|machuchuthuj]] || [[word:machuchuthush|machuchuthush]] || [[word:machuchuthu|machuchuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:machuthuth|machuthuth]] || [[word:machuthuj|machuthuj]] || [[word:machuthush|machuthush]] || [[word:machuthu|machuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:machufthuth|machufthuth]] || [[word:machufthuj|machufthuj]] || [[word:machufthush|machufthush]] || [[word:machufthuf|machufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:machuthuthu|machuthuthu]] || [[word:machuthuju|machuthuju]] || [[word:machuthushu|machuthushu]] || [[word:machuthuku|machuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:machuthuth|machuthuth]] || [[word:machuthuj|machuthuj]] || [[word:machuthush|machuthush]] || [[word:machuthu|machuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:machuthuthul|machuthuthul]] || [[word:machuthujul|machuthujul]] || [[word:machuthushul|machuthushul]] || [[word:machuthukul|machuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:machuthuthuthu|machuthuthuthu]] || [[word:machuthujuju|machuthujuju]] || [[word:machuthushushu|machuthushushu]] || [[word:machuthuku|machuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:machuthuthun|machuthuthun]] || [[word:machuthujun|machuthujun]] || [[word:machuthushun|machuthushun]] || [[word:machuthukun|machuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:machuthuthuoro|machuthuthuoro]] || [[word:machuthujuoro|machuthujuoro]] || [[word:machuthushuoro|machuthushuoro]] || [[word:machuthukuoro|machuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
